comment.body:
Alma, what are you using to monitor is vol is persistent? Are you using intraday flows from your models for things like VIX, VVIX, and other vol products? Are you looking at put and/or call skew changes over time? Are you looking at IV:RV changes? VRP changes? Or a combo of things? 

Timeframe would be cool too but if not no worries, just metrics would help a ton. Thank you 🙏
